title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 506.366 - Procedure for nonprepayment of fees
text:
506.366.  Procedure for nonprepayment of fees. — An offender seeking to bring a civil action or to appeal a judgment in a civil action without the prepayment of fees or security due to indigency shall submit a request to the court to proceed without the prepayment of fees.  The request shall include a certified copy of the offender's correctional center account statement, which shall be provided by the department of corrections for the six-month period immediately preceding the filing of the petition or notice of appeal.
(L. 1997 S.B. 56 § 3)
